title: DS_6021_Predictive_Modeling_Maxwell_Braseth_First_Quarto_Project
text:
Preface
This is a Quarto book.
To learn more about Quarto books visit https://quarto.org/docs/books.

title: 1  Introduction
text:
This is a book created from markdown and executable code.
See Knuth (1984) for additional discussion of literate programming.




Knuth, Donald E. 1984. “Literate Programming.” Comput. J. (USA) 27 (2): 97–111. https://doi.org/10.1093/comjnl/27.2.97.

title: 2  Homework 1: Data Exploration and Visualization
text:
This Chapter will focus on the topics surrounding Visualizing Data Models
Topics includes:

Partial effect plots
Partial dependent plots
Individual conditional expectation plots
Accumulated local effect plots
(Possible) Permutation feature importance
crumbs: 2  Homework 1: Data Exploration and Visualization

title: 3  Summary
text: In summary, this book has no content whatsoever.
